behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is model output quality (speaker diarization/label preservation), not local parsing. MOCK-MISS: a unit parser test cannot expose diarization errors. REAL-INFRA exists (real API), but LLM-DEP is decisive because correctness depends on what the real speech model returns. Rejected System: behavior text targets label preservation quality, which a transport/system-only test does not validate.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real multi-speaker meeting recording with known speaker turns; call the real speech-to-text API and assert transcript segments retain correct speaker labels/turn ownership needed for attendee attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is local extraction/mapping logic over transcript text and schema fields. MOCK-MISS: no cross-module boundary is required to trigger the core failure; malformed extraction is reproducible in-process. Rejected Integration: behavior text is specifically about parsing extraction, not handoff or external dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser function/object transcript fixtures containing explicit assignments; assert output structure contains exact assignee and task text fields for each assignment.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM generation decisions (coverage/completeness per attendee). Deterministic stubs would hide omission failures (MOCK-HIDE). Not Workflow: this behavior can be validated with one real summarization decision on prepared input; multi-agentic sequencing is not required by the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a transcript/summary-input fixture with tasks assigned to multiple attendees, run real summarization, and assert each assigned attendee has at least one action item in live output.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Primary failure is deterministic routing logic between known fields. This is a local mapping rule and does not require real OS/network/model output. Rejected Integration: behavior text says 'logic routes identified decisions,' which disqualifies higher levels unless module handoff is itself under test.
behaviors.test_description: Pass identified-decision objects into routing/mapping logic and assert they populate `decisions` schema entries and are excluded from narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: This checks whether real model output preserves and places decision content correctly; stubbed outputs would always pass and hide real misses. LLM-DEP applies directly to extraction/placement quality. Rejected Workflow: behavior requires one live summarization outcome, not multiple agentic handoffs.
behaviors.test_description: Run real summarization on transcripts containing explicit decisions; assert those decisions appear in `decisions` section and are not only present in narrative text.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires sequential segment processing plus merged coherence across segments, which is multiple agentic steps in sequence (MULTI-STEP). Real long-audio handling also touches system concerns, but workflow is the minimum that catches cross-step model/output interaction failures. Rejected Agentic: single-step agentic testing cannot validate segmentation-order-plus-merge behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real >60-minute recording, run full segmented processing with real STT/LLM calls, assert segmenting threshold triggers, segments are processed in order, and final merged summary is coherent with cross-segment decisions/actions retained.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end pipeline with multiple real model-dependent stages and real infrastructure boundaries. MULTI-STEP and LLM-DEP both apply; System alone is insufficient because completion depends on sequential AI outputs across stages. Rejected System: behavior text explicitly includes transcribe + summarize + structured delivery chain.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the production-like flow on a real meeting audio file: upload, real transcription API, real summarization, and final structured output delivery; assert run completes automatically and output schema is fully populated.
